title: dolicholobium philippinense
intro: Dolicholobium philippinense is a plant species that belongs to the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to the Philippines and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing fever and alleviating pain, promoting overall health and well-being. Dolicholobium philippinense can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
